channel.title: ClearLineage on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in ClearLineage on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to get transparent theme on Android 8 to 13 custom roms
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-_KKPRlR4ekw/YyoypRA_oYI/AAAAAAAAN7g/FX_1Hbs62jgQ1Qlpj1IN2jljSr8IKaepACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1663709858461463-0.png" alt=""> There are many electronic devices other then PCs aka computer which install and loads operating system out of them most popular one is keypad mobile phones after that we got smartphones when Apple inc’s founder steve jobs released iPhone which has GUI - graphial user interface operating system named iOS from iPhone 2 that may look basic considering now but back then it’s cool and gorgeous which gone through alot of improvement and changes to make it’s interface look and feel better for user friendly experience on the go.
